definite_new.title: Salt Typhoon Is Hacking the World's Phone and Internet Giants

content.abstract: Chinese hacking group Salt Typhoon breached major American telecom companies across multiple nations in one of the most prolific cyber espionage campaigns.

definite_new.title: Daily Multivitamin Slows Signs of Biological Ageing

content.abstract: Clinical evidence shows supplements have stronger anti-aging effects in individuals displaying accelerated biological aging. Potential paradigm shift in preventive medicine.

definite_new.title: Monthly HIV-Drug Injections Offer Potent Alternative to Daily Tablets

content.abstract: Long-acting injections effectively suppress HIV in patients with mental health conditions and adherence challenges. Game-changer for treatment compliance.

definite_new.title: Laser-Based 3D Printing Could Build Future Bases on the Moon

content.abstract: Ohio State researchers demonstrate converting lunar regolith into building material using laser-directed energy deposition. Could enable self-sufficient lunar bases reducing Earth supply dependence.

definite_new.title: ARPA-H Devotes $144M to Studies That Slow Aging and Extend Quality of Life

content.abstract: ARPA-H will support first substantial clinical trials examining interventions to combat aging. $144M investment signals US government commitment to longevity research.

definite_new.title: GLP-1 Drugs Linked to Lower Addiction Rates in Large Veterans Study

content.abstract: GLP-1 receptor agonists appeared to reduce substance abuse disorders and mitigate serious associated harms in large-scale veterans study. Unexpected therapeutic benefit beyond obesity.

definite_new.title: New HIV Cure Approach Forces Hidden Virus Into Tripping Immune Sensor

content.abstract: Novel HIV cure strategy demonstrates encouraging outcomes in laboratory and human studies. Forces latent virus to reveal itself to immune system.

definite_new.title: Biodegradable Plastic from Milk Protein Vanishes in 13 Weeks

content.abstract: Scientists developed biodegradable packaging from milk protein and natural materials that fully decomposes in soil within approximately three months.

definite_new.title: Greater Washington Leads Nation in Regional Job Loss After Government Cuts

content.abstract: Data showing significant employment decline in Washington DC metropolitan area compared to other regions. Impact of federal government downsizing on regional economies.

definite_new.title: Ethiopia's Gebeya Partners M-PESA for AI Tool Access via Mobile Payments

content.abstract: Ethiopian AI platform Gebeya partnered M-PESA enabling AI tool access through mobile wallet payments without credit cards. AI democratization in emerging markets.

definite_new.title: Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses Privacy Breach: Workers Watch Bathroom Footage

content.abstract: Workers report watching Ray-Ban Meta-shot footage of people using bathrooms. Privacy violation in smart glasses raising regulatory and ethical concerns.

definite_new.title: DARPA's New X-76: Speed of Jet, Freedom of Helicopter

content.abstract: DARPA announces new X-76 aircraft combining jet speed with helicopter freedom of movement. Significant military aviation innovation.

definite_new.title: Cholera Vaccination Campaigns Resume After Three-Year Pause as Supply Doubles

content.abstract: Global oral cholera vaccine supply doubled to 70M doses annually, enabling preventive campaigns to restart in Mozambique, DRC, and Bangladesh. Major public health milestone.

definite_new.title: Disorder Drives One of Nature's Most Complex Machines: Nuclear Pore Complexes

content.abstract: New high-resolution imaging reveals how nuclear pore complexes function through molecular disorder. Hundreds to thousands of molecules transit these structures.

uncertain.title: OpenAI Acquires Promptfoo to Secure Its AI Agents

content.abstract: OpenAI acquired AI security startup Promptfoo to secure AI agent deployments in critical business operations, reflecting industry scramble for safe AI technology.

uncertain.title: Anthropic Sues Defense Department Over Supply-Chain Risk Designation

content.abstract: Anthropic filed legal action challenging DOD's characterization as supply-chain risk, calling actions unprecedented and unlawful. Reflects tensions between AI companies and military.

uncertain.title: Anthropic Launches Code Review Tool to Check Flood of AI-Generated Code

content.abstract: Anthropic released Code Review within Claude Code, a multi-agent system analyzing AI-generated code for errors. Addresses growing concern over AI code quality in production systems.

uncertain.title: Russian Government Hackers Targeting Signal and WhatsApp Users

content.abstract: Dutch intelligence accuses Russia-backed hackers of running large-scale global campaign against encrypted messaging app users. State-sponsored cyber operations targeting civilian communications.

uncertain.title: Nscale Hits $14.6B Valuation as AI Infrastructure Startup Raises $2B

content.abstract: Nvidia-backed AI infrastructure startup Nscale raised $2B megafunding round, hitting $14.6B valuation. Former Meta executives Sandberg and Clegg joined board. Called 'Stargate Norway'.

uncertain.title: Qualcomm Partners with Neura Robotics for Humanoid Robot Development

content.abstract: Neura Robotics developing robots utilizing Qualcomm's IQ10 processors. Partnership signals acceleration in consumer and industrial humanoid robotics.

uncertain.title: Zoox Starts Mapping Dallas and Phoenix for Robotaxi Commercial Deployment

content.abstract: Amazon-owned autonomous vehicle company Zoox preparing for commercial deployment pending federal regulatory approval in Dallas and Phoenix.

uncertain.title: How AI Is Turning the Iran Conflict Into Theater

content.abstract: AI-powered intelligence dashboards tracking US-Israel strikes against Iran creating 'wartime circus' that obscures information. Open-source data feeds and AI-generated summaries spreading inaccuracies while creating illusion of expertise.

uncertain.title: Pentagon AI Surveillance: Murky Laws Allow Mass Domestic AI Monitoring

content.abstract: Most information government can collect on Americans isn't regulated by Fourth Amendment or statute, allowing AI to aggregate unregulated data at scale. Deep legal analysis of domestic surveillance gaps.

uncertain.title: How Congress Can Restore Independence of US Science

content.abstract: Policymakers should reinstate government research funding and re-establish decentralized governance at scientific agencies. Critical editorial on science policy independence.

uncertain.title: How Fast Does a Protein Fold? Real-Time Technique Captures the Moment

content.abstract: New real-time technique captures protein folding dynamics, revealing proteins achieve complex 3D configurations faster than DNA molecules. Breakthrough in structural biology.

uncertain.title: Electric-Vehicle Batteries Toughen Up to Beat the Heat

content.abstract: Battery technology advancing rapidly to withstand climate-related temperature increases and performance degradation. Critical for EV deployment in hot climate regions.

uncertain.title: World's Salt Lakes Are Drying Up With No Easy Solutions

content.abstract: Global salt lakes experiencing accelerated desiccation due to water diversion and climate change. Threatens unique ecosystems and human communities dependent on these resources.

uncertain.title: Offshore Wind Farms: National Security Risk or Manageable Challenge?

content.abstract: Investigation into offshore wind installations interfering with military radar. Tested mitigation strategies including next-gen phased-array radar and dual-use sensing have proven effective in NATO/EU operations.

uncertain.title: FLASH Radiotherapy: The Millisecond That Could Change Cancer Treatment

content.abstract: FLASH radiotherapy delivers ultrahigh-power radiation in bursts under 1/10 second, showing significantly less injury to normal tissue while maintaining tumor-killing effectiveness. Clinical deployment potential within a decade.

uncertain.title: NASA Administrator Signals Accelerated Moon and Mars Mission Timeline

content.abstract: Jared Isaacman indicates NASA may accelerate lunar research and could initiate new Mars mission in 2028. Shift in space exploration priorities under new leadership.

uncertain.title: Many Heat-Stressed Tropical Insects Are Reaching Their Limits

content.abstract: Extensive research across Peru and Kenya reveals minimal heat tolerance adaptation amid rising global temperatures. Signals potential ecosystem collapse in tropical regions.

uncertain.title: Nearly 700,000 Displaced in Lebanon as Middle East Crisis Escalates

content.abstract: Massive displacement across the region on day 10 of Middle East conflict, with rising food and fuel prices threatening vulnerable populations. Nearly 700,000 displaced.

uncertain.title: UN Calls for Fair Play in Global Race for Critical Minerals

content.abstract: As lithium and cobalt become central to zero-carbon economies, UN advocates for equitable global mineral distribution. Highlights resource governance gaps.

uncertain.title: Compound Drought and Heat Extremes Surging Since Early 2000s

content.abstract: Heatwave-led compound drought events more than doubled between 1980-2001 and 2002-2023. Regime shift in land-atmosphere dynamics amplifying dangerous combined extremes.

uncertain.title: Climate Models May Be Missing Massive Carbon Emissions from Boreal Wildfires

content.abstract: Northern forest fires burn deep into peat soils releasing carbon stored for centuries. Climate models underestimating wildfire carbon emissions.

uncertain.title: Central Banking in Age of Geoeconomic Fragmentation - Bundesbank President

content.abstract: Bundesbank president Joachim Nagel addressed economic fragmentation and global uncertainty affecting central banking operations and monetary policy coordination.

uncertain.title: Fed Governor: Operationalizing AI at the Federal Reserve

content.abstract: Fed Governor Christopher Waller discussed implementing AI capabilities at the Federal Reserve. Signals AI adoption in central bank operations.

uncertain.title: Fed Governor Cook on AI and Productivity Across the Economy

content.abstract: Federal Reserve Board member Lisa Cook discussed AI and productivity across the economy at NABE conference. Central bank assessment of AI's macroeconomic impact.

uncertain.title: Reduced Immigration Slowed Population Growth for Nation and Most States

content.abstract: Census data reveals immigration's significant impact on US population growth rates. Reduced immigration directly correlated with slower growth nationwide.

uncertain.title: Fewer People Globally Say Belief in God Necessary for Morality

content.abstract: Global survey data shows declining percentages viewing religious faith as prerequisite for morality across multiple countries and regions.

uncertain.title: Family Caregiving in an Aging America: Gender-Based Differences

content.abstract: Comprehensive research on how demographic shifts influence family caregiving dynamics, highlighting gender-based differences in caregiving roles.
